__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Qin Bronze Chariot,Four-goat Square Zun,Murder of Roger,Remains of Sipán Lord,Akashic Records,Nuada's Silver Arm
|rank=orange
|amount=6
|category=self
|description=Per Orange Brand Cases opened, Snail ATK +12; Orange Brand Cases Opened: 50/50
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
